name: autoboard
description: AI-driven development orchestrator for Claude Code and Codex

interface.shortDescription: Orchestrate parallel coding sessions with review and QA gates
interface.longDescription: Autoboard is an AI engineering lead for Claude Code and Codex. It breaks ambitious features into focused sessions, runs them in isolated worktrees, enforces review gates, and validates the integrated result with QA and coherence checks.
defaultPrompt: Use Autoboard to design a feature with /autoboard:brainstorm
Turn a design doc into a manifest with /autoboard:task-manifest
Run a manifest end to end with /autoboard:run
